input.prompt:
I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

input.initialPrompt:
I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

data.content:
Here's a complete example:

**XAML**
```xml
<RefreshView Command="{Binding RefreshCommand}"
             IsRefreshing="{Binding IsRefreshing}">
    <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Items}"
                    SelectionMode="Single"
                    SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedItem}"
                    SelectionChangedCommand="{Binding SelectionChangedCommand}">
        <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
            <DataTemplate x:DataType="models:Item">
                <Grid Padding="10">
                    <Label Text="{Binding Name}" />
                </Grid>
            </DataTemplate>
        </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
    </CollectionView>
</RefreshView>
```

**ViewModel bindings needed:**

| Property / Command | Type | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `Items` | `ObservableCollection<Item>` | Data source |
| `SelectedItem` | `Item` | Two-way; tracks selection |
| `SelectionChangedCommand` | `IAsyncRelayCommand` | Navigates on select |
| `IsRefreshing` | `bool` | Two-way; controls spinner |
| `RefreshCommand` | `IAsyncRelayCommand` | Reloads from API |

**Key points:**

- **`SelectionMode="Single"`** — only one item selectable at a time.
- **`RefreshView`** wraps the `CollectionView`; bind `IsRefreshing` so you can set it to `false` when the API call finishes.
- **Clear `SelectedItem`** after navigation so the user can re-select the same item:

```csharp
[RelayCommand]
async Task OnSelectionChanged()
{
    if (SelectedItem is null) return;
    await Shell.Current.GoToAsync(
        $"{nameof(DetailPage)}",
        new Dictionary<string, object> { { "Item", SelectedItem } });
    SelectedItem = null;   // reset so it's re-selectable
}

[RelayCommand]
async Task OnRefresh()
{
    Items = new ObservableCollection<Item>(await _api.GetItemsAsync());
    IsRefreshing = false;
}
```
